g.text: Rasterize the renderable trees via `mdd render` (current)
Skill judgment only: "just the deploy diagrams"
-> `mdd render --only deploy`. It shells to the
print rendered + diagnostics; exit 1 if any diagnostic
cycle N closed / subset rendered; SVGs ready for the viewer
OCL-DIFF-SVG-PATH-DERIVED for the cycle case). The
tree set is RenderTree::ALL — one enumeration, no
